description: High-altitude desert landscapes, crystal-clear Pangong Lake, and quiet monasteries — a trip that felt like another planet.
First solo trip into the mountains. Misty mornings, pine forests, and the simple joy of slowing down.
Pink city architecture, street food, and wandering through historic forts with friends.
Sunset walks on the beach, coastal roads, and the relaxed rhythm of the Konkan coast.
Ganga ghats, yoga mornings, and the sound of the river — a reset before a busy semester.
Lake Pichola reflections, narrow old-city lanes, and rooftop views over white marble palaces.
